ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 3 PM to 5 PM UTC Today
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance from 3 PM to 5 PM UTC today. During this window, VPN connectivity will be unavailable. We recommend planning your work accordingly.

If you need assistance or have questions about the maintenance schedule, please contact the IT Helpdesk via our internal portal: <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: IT Helpdesk Ticket #9876 Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Hello,

Our automated monitoring system has flagged a potential security incident linked to your account. To resolve this issue and prevent any service interruption, please reset your password immediately by following the link below:

<URL>

Failure to act within 24 hours will result in temporary suspension of your account. This is a mandatory security measure.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
IT Helpdesk Team
